methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran drives regional escalation with attacks on UAE and threats over Strait of Hormuz
bullets: Iran conducted attacks targeting the UAE, drawing widespread international condemnation for dangerous escalation.
Washington and Tehran exchanged direct threats focused on the Strait of Hormuz.
Violence flared in the Strait of Hormuz, causing a significant surge in global oil prices.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iranian force posture near the Strait of Hormuz for further disruptions.
